docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $5,000.00 FILED BY CHRISTOFFER,MARTI AS TO DEFENDANT HJERMSTAD,MORGAN ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR SEP-07-1993 AT 08:00 AM IN DEPT 03
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT HJERMSTAD,MORGAN

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CHRISTOFFER,MARTI IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT HJERMSTAD,MORGAN CT FINDS THAT MONEY CONTRIBUTED BY PLTF WAS NOT A LOAN BUT AN INVESTMENT W/C WAS DISSIPATED IN STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
